title: Ubiquiti UACC-PoE+-2.5G - 2.5Gbit PoE injector 48V/0,65A (30W), white
description: Ubiquiti UACC-PoE+-2.5G is an adapter that can power UniFi PoE+ devices, reduce dependency on PoE switch power, and provide a Multi-Gigabit LAN connection Delivers up to 30W of PoE+ Surge, peak pulse, and overcurrent protection LED indicator for status monitoring U7-Pro, U7-Pro-Max, U7-Pro-Outdoor, U7-Outdoor, U7-Pro-Wall U6-Enterprise-IW, U6-Enterprise 2.5GE PoE++ adapter Wall mount bracket AC power cord (2) Screws and wall plugs
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Ethernet speed [Mb/s] 10/100/1000/2500 Gigabit LAN Yes Power The input voltage [V] 230V AC Output Power [W] 30 Pin powering 4,5 (+), 7,8 (-) PoE Out ports 1 Output Voltage [V] 48 Output Current [A] 0,65
